arrows.name: Accurate
arrows.rules: Gain +2 to attack rolls made with this arrow

arrows.name: Explosive
arrows.rules: On impact, this arrow explodes and deals 2 fire damage to each creature within 5 ft.

arrows.name: Flaming
arrows.rules: All damage from this arrow is fire damage and ignites flammable objects.

arrows.name: Healing
arrows.rules: Instead of dealing damage to allies with this arrow, they heal 1d4 hitpoints instead.

arrows.name: Radiant
arrows.rules: All attacks with this arrow deal radiant damage instead.

arrows.name: Boundy
arrows.rules: This arrow can bounce off of one surface before it hits its first target.

arrows.name: Roped
arrows.rules: After dealing damage to a target, if the target is small or medium, you can either pull yourself to the target or make a strength contest to pull the target 10 ft towards you.

arrows.name: Glowing
arrows.rules: The arrow gains all benefits from the Light spell and leaves a glowing trail in it's path.

arrows.name: Immaterial
arrows.rules: You can shoot this arrow through solid objects.

arrows.name: Floating
arrows.rules: Gravity does not affect this arrow.

arrows.name: Foggy
arrows.rules: Bursts into a cloud of mist on impact. Grants partial cover.

arrows.name: Tongued
arrows.rules: You can dictate a short sentence to the arrow which it recites on impact.

arrows.name: Second Chance
arrows.rules: You can remove one feature from this arrow and regain the crafting points. Including this one.

arrows.name: True
arrows.rules: Can hit invisible targets if you describe the target to the arrow.

arrows.name: Colorful
arrows.rules: Choose a color. On impact this arrow bursts, covering the area in hard to remove coloring.

arrows.name: Listening
arrows.rules: For the next minute after firing, you can listen as if you were in the space of the arrow

arrows.name: Scrying
arrows.rules: For the next minute after firing you can see as if you were in the space of the arrow

arrows.name: Invisible
arrows.rules: Really hard to find, but you gain advantage on attacks made with this arrow.

arrows.name: Bursting
arrows.rules: This arrow brusts into many pieces on impact and the splinters deal 1 damage to each creature within 30 ft.

trinkets.name: The Ash-Wood Lion
trinkets.rules: A small, jaggedly carved lion. As a reaction when an ally within 30ft fails a save against being Frightened, you can hold the carving aloft to let them reroll that save.

trinkets.name: Whittled Willow-Whistle
trinkets.rules: A smooth green-wood whistle. When blown, minor beasts (CR 0) become friendly for 1 minute. In combat, use it to distract an enemy, giving the next ally who attacks it a +1 bonus to hit.

trinkets.name: The Cedar Knot-Mender
trinkets.rules: A thimble-shaped piece of cedar. While holding this, any magical healing you provide to an ally also stabilizes a second dying creature within 5 feet of the target.

trinkets.name: Oak-Eye Spectacle
trinkets.rules: A ring of dark oak with a hollow center. Use a Bonus Action to look through it and 'mark' a target. The next ally to hit that target deals an extra 1d4 damage.

trinkets.name: Hollow-Pine Censer
trinkets.rules: A pine cone carved to hold embers. During a short rest, allies regain an extra 1d6 HP. In combat, you can use an Action to grant an ally within 5ft a fresh save against being Poisoned.

trinkets.name: The Drifting Seed-Pod
trinkets.rules: A weightless carving of a maple seed. As a Bonus Action, toss it to an ally within 30ft; their next 10ft of movement doesn't provoke Opportunity Attacks. It then drifts back to your hand.

trinkets.name: Elder-Stump Chalk-Case
trinkets.rules: A gnarled wooden tube holding glowing chalk. If you draw a symbol on a surface, allies who stay within 5ft of it gain a +1 bonus to AC for 1 round.

trinkets.name: The Mimic-Nut
trinkets.rules: A walnut shell carved with a tiny mouth. It can record 6 seconds of audio. If thrown (Action) to a point within 30ft, the sound plays, allowing a nearby ally to Hide as a Bonus Action.

trinkets.name: Root-Bound Lantern
trinkets.rules: A lantern frame grown from intertwined roots. It sheds 10ft of light. Allies within this light gain a +2 bonus to Initiative rolls if the lantern is active at the start of combat.
